languages.text: {n}Дознаватель принимается обходить вас и остальную свиту по кругу, пристально рассматривая каждого.{/n} "Безусловно, вы все реальны. Как и мои воспоминания о том, что было только что. Либо хитрые твари играют с нашим разумом, либо здесь творится что-то, что я не в силах объяснить, Лорд-капитан".

traits.locale_text: {n}Дознаватель принимается обходить вас и остальную свиту по кругу, пристально рассматривая каждого.{/n} "Безусловно, вы все реальны. Как и мои воспоминания о том, что было только что. Либо хитрые твари играют с нашим разумом, либо здесь творится что-то, что я не в силах объяснить, Лорд-капитан".
traits.speaker: HeinrixCompanion

languages.text: {n}The Interrogator takes to circling the members of your retinue, scrutinising each one in turn.{/n} "You are all real, there is no doubt. As are my memories of what just happened. Either the devious wretches are playing with our minds, or there is something else at work here that I cannot explain, Lord Captain."
languages.original_text: {n}Дознаватель принимается обходить вас и остальную свиту по кругу, пристально рассматривая каждого.{/n} "Безусловно, вы все реальны. Как и мои воспоминания о том, что было только что. Либо хитрые твари играют с нашим разумом, либо здесь творится что-то, что я не в силах объяснить, Лорд-капитан".

As are my memories of what just happened. Either the devious wretches are playing with our minds, or there is something else at work here that I cannot explain, Lord Captain."

Either the devious wretches are playing with our minds, or there is something else at work here that I cannot explain, Lord Captain."

{n}The Interrogator takes to circling the members of your retinue, scrutinising each one in turn.{/n} "You are all real, there is no doubt. As are my memories of what just happened. Either the devious wretches are playing with our minds, or there is something else at work here that I cannot explain, Lord Captain."

languages.text: {n}那位审讯官开始绕着你的随从转圈，逐一审视着他们。{/n}“你们毫无疑问都是真实的，而我对刚才发生的事的记忆也是真实的。看来不是有卑鄙的混蛋在操纵我们的心智，就是有某种我无法解释的力量在作祟，舰长大人。”
languages.original_text: {n}The Interrogator takes to circling the members of your retinue, scrutinising each one in turn.{/n} "You are all real, there is no doubt. As are my memories of what just happened. Either the devious wretches are playing with our minds, or there is something else at work here that I cannot explain, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: {n}那位审讯官开始绕着你的随从转圈，逐一审视着他们。{/n}“你们毫无疑问都是真实的，而我对刚才发生的事的记忆也是真实的。看来不是有卑鄙的混蛋在操纵我们的心智，就是有某种我无法解释的力量在作祟，舰长大人。”

languages.text: {n}L'interrogateur se met à tourner autour du petit groupe, passant en revue chacun des membres de votre entourage.{/n} « Vous êtes tous réels, aucun doute là-dessus. Tout comme mes souvenirs de ce qui vient de se passer. Soit ces misérables jouent avec nos esprits, soit c'est le fait de quelque force occulte que je ne m'explique pas, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. »
languages.original_text: {n}The Interrogator takes to circling the members of your retinue, scrutinising each one in turn.{/n} "You are all real, there is no doubt. As are my memories of what just happened. Either the devious wretches are playing with our minds, or there is something else at work here that I cannot explain, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: {n}L'interrogateur se met à tourner autour du petit groupe, passant en revue chacun des membres de votre entourage.{/n} « Vous êtes tous réels, aucun doute là-dessus. Tout comme mes souvenirs de ce qui vient de se passer. Soit ces misérables jouent avec nos esprits, soit c'est le fait de quelque force occulte que je ne m'explique pas, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. »

languages.text: {n}Sorgucu, maiyetinin üyelerinin etrafında dönerek her birini sırayla inceliyor.{/n} "Hepiniz gerçeksiniz, şüphe yok. Tıpkı az önce olanlarla ilgili anılarım gibi. Ya o sinsi sefiller aklımızla oynuyor ya da burada açıklayamadığım başka şeyler dönüyor Lord Kaptan."
languages.original_text: {n}The Interrogator takes to circling the members of your retinue, scrutinising each one in turn.{/n} "You are all real, there is no doubt. As are my memories of what just happened. Either the devious wretches are playing with our minds, or there is something else at work here that I cannot explain, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: {n}Sorgucu, maiyetinin üyelerinin etrafında dönerek her birini sırayla inceliyor.{/n} "Hepiniz gerçeksiniz, şüphe yok. Tıpkı az önce olanlarla ilgili anılarım gibi. Ya o sinsi sefiller aklımızla oynuyor ya da burada açıklayamadığım başka şeyler dönüyor Lord Kaptan."

languages.text: {n}El Interrogador empieza a dar vueltas en torno a los miembros de tu séquito, estudiándolos de uno en uno.{/n} «Son todos reales, no cabe duda. Igual que mis recuerdos de lo que acaba de suceder. O estos despojos miserables juegan con nuestras mentes, o aquí sucede algo más que no puedo explicar, Lord Capitán».
languages.original_text: {n}The Interrogator takes to circling the members of your retinue, scrutinising each one in turn.{/n} "You are all real, there is no doubt. As are my memories of what just happened. Either the devious wretches are playing with our minds, or there is something else at work here that I cannot explain, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: {n}El Interrogador empieza a dar vueltas en torno a los miembros de tu séquito, estudiándolos de uno en uno.{/n} «Son todos reales, no cabe duda. Igual que mis recuerdos de lo que acaba de suceder. O estos despojos miserables juegan con nuestras mentes, o aquí sucede algo más que no puedo explicar, Lord Capitán».

languages.text: {n}Der Interrogator lässt seinen Blick über die Mitglieder deines Gefolges schweifen und mustert sie der Reihe nach.{/n} "Ihr seid alle real, daran besteht kein Zweifel. Genau wie meine Erinnerungen an das, was gerade passiert ist. Entweder diese teuflischen Bastarde spielen mit unserem Verstand oder hier ist etwas anderes am Werk, das ich nicht erklären kann, Lord Captain."
languages.original_text: {n}The Interrogator takes to circling the members of your retinue, scrutinising each one in turn.{/n} "You are all real, there is no doubt. As are my memories of what just happened. Either the devious wretches are playing with our minds, or there is something else at work here that I cannot explain, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Interrogator lässt seinen Blick über die Mitglieder deines Gefolges schweifen und mustert sie der Reihe nach.{/n} "Ihr seid alle real, daran besteht kein Zweifel. Genau wie meine Erinnerungen an das, was gerade passiert ist. Entweder diese teuflischen Bastarde spielen mit unserem Verstand oder hier ist etwas anderes am Werk, das ich nicht erklären kann, Lord Captain."

languages.text: {n}尋問官はあなたの側近のメンバーを囲み、一人ずつ厳しく観察する。{/n}「皆、本物だ。疑う余地はない。そして、今起きた出来事の記憶も確かだ。悪意のある者たちが我々の心を弄んでいるのか、それとも、他に何かが起きているのか。説明できない。艦長様。」
languages.original_text: {n}The Interrogator takes to circling the members of your retinue, scrutinising each one in turn.{/n} "You are all real, there is no doubt. As are my memories of what just happened. Either the devious wretches are playing with our minds, or there is something else at work here that I cannot explain, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: {n}尋問官はあなたの側近のメンバーを囲み、一人ずつ厳しく観察する。{/n}「皆、本物だ。疑う余地はない。そして、今起きた出来事の記憶も確かだ。悪意のある者たちが我々の心を弄んでいるのか、それとも、他に何かが起きているのか。説明できない。艦長様。」
